Selkirk

Selkirk LUXX Control Air with InfiniGrit

Premium control paddle built around touch, resets, drops, and finesse.

A soft-game paddle for players who want to keep balls low, place dinks, and reduce over-hitting without giving up premium construction.

TypeControl
Shapeelongated / invikta
CoreThick control core
FaceInfiniGrit / carbon-fiberglass style face

Play profile

Power7.1
Control9.4
Spin8.2
Forgiveness8.8
Hand speed7.4

Scores are editorial comparison notes based on product positioning and common review signals; they are not lab measurements.

How the LUXX Control Air with InfiniGrit plays

The Selkirk LUXX Control Air with InfiniGrit is a control-oriented paddle. On our 0–10 comparison scale its strongest traits are control and forgiveness. Its elongated shape adds reach and leverage for power and spin, but the sweet spot sits higher and rewards consistent contact.

It is aimed at 3.0–4.5 players, and it is forgiving enough for improvers still grooving their swing. It favours touch over raw put-away power. It sits in the premium price tier — confirm the current price at the source before buying. It is part of the Selkirk pro/control line.
